subject: Stay cable anchorage stressing sequence – Tower T1
question: Structural drawings specify stressing sequence A through F for stay cables at Tower T1 but do not address deviation if a cable fails elongation check on first pass. Contractor requests clarification on remedial procedure and whether destressing and restressing is permissible without engineer approval on a case-by-case basis.

subject: Drilled shaft over-excavation at Pier W4
question: During drilled shaft drilling at Pier W4 shaft DS-W4-03 the contractor encountered voids at 48 to 52 feet associated with historic landfill material. Shaft bottom is 4 feet below design tip elevation. Engineer of record review of bearing capacity and whether shaft can be accepted as drilled or must be extended.

subject: Pylon concrete mix design cold weather placement
question: Spec section 03 30 00 requires concrete temperature between 55 and 90 degrees F at time of placement. January slipform operations may encounter ambient temperatures below 35 degrees F. Contractor requests approval of heated enclosure and mix design with Type III cement for accelerated cure.

subject: Lid deck waterproofing membrane compatibility
question: Spec 07 13 52 requires hot-applied rubberized asphalt membrane on lid deck but landscape architect's planting detail shows 24 inches of growing media over a drainage mat directly on the membrane. Waterproofing manufacturer's warranty requires root barrier between membrane and growing media. Please resolve conflict and confirm correct assembly.

subject: Ballard Bridge fender pile spacing
question: Design drawings show steel pipe fender piles at 8-foot centers but the geotechnical baseline report assumes 10-foot centers for pile capacity calculations. Contractor requests direction – if 8-foot spacing governs the GBR pile capacity values must be recalculated.
